coverage_note: Canonical annual layer for river x pressure and river x compliance crossings.
Canonical crossing layer for river x reservoir monthly behavior.
Main hydrologic and continuous sensor backbone for river-first analysis.
Discrete river chemistry remains sparse, but the domain is still explicit and separable.
Structured pressure inventory is present, but many sources still need tabular extraction before direct crossings.
Lower-basin treated-water compliance layer; pressure-like, but not raw-river chemistry.
Best pressure/compliance annual crossing layer currently available.
Violation/event layer for aligning compliance incidents with river conditions.
Reservoir annex for monthly modulation of the river signal.
Useful structural and current-condition context, but not the main crossing layer.
Interpretive bridge layer for sediment-facing summaries used by the report.
Canonical response layer for linking fine depositional behavior back to river context.
Snapshot sediment-response layer; interpretive anchor, not a long time series.
Coverage QA layer for every domain before crossing.
Provenance and gap-tracking layer, not a crossing layer.
